sentences.text: Hi Rosa Linda this is Josh over at rentable. I sent you an email yesterday and he forwarded over to Kelsey and she got back to me. If you wanna talk at ten o'clock this morning. I'm on the June call and I just wanted to let her know I'm still honor that she can still make it. I'll just give me a call let me know and we need to reschedule. My cellphone is six five one seven one seven five six three four again Josh over at rentable for our ten o'clock call give me a call when you get a chance. I'll shoot me an email thanks.
